# spec-kit Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-03

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5.x, Node.js 20 LTS, React 18 + React, Vite, Express, React Router, CSV parse/write utilities, bcrypt, JSON Web Token (JWT) or signed cookie utilities (001-admin-review-responses)
- CSV files stored locally on the server (001-admin-review-responses)
- TypeScript 5.9 (frontend and backend) + React 19, Vite 7, Express 5, Zod 4 (002-enrich-response-admin-view)

- TypeScript 5.x (frontend), Node.js 20 LTS (backend) + React 18 + Vite, Express 4, Zod for validation, (001-customer-survey-page)

## Project Structure

```text
backend/
frontend/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test; npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (frontend), Node.js 20 LTS (backend): Follow standard conventions
